message:
test(engine): expand test coverage across evidence, contract, and mining modules

Parser frontier evidence:
- Update export_declaration specimen to use named export clause syntax
  ("const x = 42; export { x };") matching what the parser accepts
- Fix optional_chaining specimen: now marked as accepted (was incorrectly
  rejected) since the parser handles optional chaining
- Add parser_frontier_evidence_integration.rs with full harness
  execution, bundle artifact generation, serde round-trips, and contract
  satisfaction tests

Law mining:
- Add `all_schema_versions_are_distinct_and_non_empty` test verifying
  all 11 schema version constants are unique and prefixed with
  "franken-engine."
- Add `provenance_source_kind_serde_round_trip` test for
  Counterexample and EvidenceEntry variants

Lowering parity evidence:
- Add schema version constant non-emptiness assertions
- Add ParityVerdict serde round-trip covering all 5 variants
- Add ParityFinding and ParityEvidenceEvent serde round-trip tests

Seqlock reader-writer contract:
- Add schema version uniqueness assertion across all 6 version constants
- Add accepted_candidates count consistency check against inventory
- Add render_summary content assertion for bead_id and component

Claim atom lattice:
- Add schema version constant non-emptiness test

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
